entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: Chun d’fhaisnéis phearsanta a scriosadh. Má dhéanann tú an t-iarratas seo, scriosfaimid an fhaisnéis phearsanta atá againn fút amhail dáta d’iarratais ónár dtaifid agus treoróimid aon soláthraithe seirbhíse an rud céanna a dhéanamh. I gcásanna áirithe, féadfar scriosadh a bhaint amach trí dhí-aitheantas a dhéanamh ar an bhfaisnéis. Má roghnaíonn tú d’fhaisnéis phearsanta a scriosadh, seans nach mbeidh tú in ann feidhmeanna áirithe a úsáid a bhfuil gá acu le d’fhaisnéis phearsanta chun oibriú. Chun stop a chur le díol d’fhaisnéise pearsanta. Ní dhíolaimid ná ní ligeann muid ar cíos d’fhaisnéis phearsanta le tríú páirtithe ar chúis ar bith. Ní dhíolaimid d’fhaisnéis phearsanta ar chúiteamh airgeadaíochta. Mar sin féin, faoi chúinsí áirithe, d’fhéadfaí a mheas gur “díol” faoi dhlí California é aistriú faisnéise pearsanta chuig tríú páirtí, nó laistigh dár dteaghlach cuideachtaí, gan chúiteamh airgeadaíochta. Is tusa an t-aon úinéir ar do Shonraí Pearsanta agus is féidir leat nochtadh nó scriosadh a iarraidh am ar bith. Má chuireann tú iarratas isteach chun stop a chur le díol d’fhaisnéise pearsanta, stopfaimid d’aistrithe den sórt sin a dhéanamh. Tabhair faoi deara, má iarrann tú orainn do shonraí a scriosadh nó stop a chur lena ndíol, go bhféadfadh sé sin dul i bhfeidhm ar do thaithí linn, agus seans nach mbeidh tú in ann páirt a ghlacadh i gcláir áirithe nó i seirbhísí ballraíochta áirithe a bhfuil gá acu le húsáid d’fhaisnéise pearsanta chun feidhmiú. Ach in aon chúinsí, ní dhéanfaidh muid idirdhealú i do choinne as do chearta a fheidhmiú. Chun do chearta cosanta sonraí California a thuairiscítear thuas a fheidhmiú, seol d’iarratas nó d’iarratais trí ríomhphost: support@inspir.app Tá do chearta cosanta sonraí, a thuairiscítear thuas, cumhdaithe ag an CCPA, giorrúchán ar an California Consumer Privacy Act. Chun tuilleadh a fháil amach, tabhair cuairt ar shuíomh gréasáin oifigiúil California Legislative Information. Tháinig an CCPA i bhfeidhm ar 01/01/2020.

entries.source: Treat each turn as collaborative work: draft, critique, revise, ask for a decision, update open questions, and hand the next useful move to either the user or AI. Challenge weak ideas when the selected mode calls for it.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.
entries.value: Bain triail as go díreach i Socratic Instruction. Más mian leat míniú níos séimhe ar dtús, tosaigh le Learn Anything, ansin bog isteach i gceisteanna Sócraiteacha nuair atá an bunfhoclóir ar eolas agat.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: Bain triail as i Flashcard Builder. Más gá duit an topaic a thuiscint sula ndéanann tú cártaí, tosaigh i Learn Anything. Más mian leat brú tar éis cártaí a athbhreithniú, bog chuig Quiz Me On Trivia nó Viva Practice.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Murab ionann agus chatbot ginearálta, eagraíonn inspir IS timpeall ar mhodhanna foghlama ionas gur féidir le foghlaimeoirí tosú leis an gcineál cabhrach atá uathu: leidí, ceisteanna, tráthanna ceist, cuimhne ghníomhach, rólghlacadh, díospóireacht, nó aiseolas.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: Díbhalbhaigh an scannán

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: Déan imeachtaí stairiúla a chíoradh trí chúiseanna, spreagthaí, iarmhairtí agus féidearthachtaí malartacha.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: Úsáid

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: Úsáid "{value1}" mar phointe tosaigh, ní mar chríoch. Bogann an seisiún foghlama is láidre ó léamh go cuimhne, aiseolas, agus céim infheicthe amháin eile.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: Úsáid sosanna 50/10

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: Úsáid tábla dlúth don fhreagra tugtha, don smaoineamh ceart, don mhíthuiscint, agus don chéad bhogadh eile.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: Úsáid scórchárta inchreidteachta agus ceisteanna chun an chéad rud eile a fhiosrú.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: Úsáid conradh domhain-oibre le toradh, plean bloc, rialacha, agus athbhreithniú.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: Úsáid cosán treoraithe chun bogadh ó mhearbhall go samplaí, seiceálacha, agus cuimhne.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Úsáid mód beo foghlama IS chun ceisteanna, aiseolas, samplaí, agus chéad chéimeanna eile a dhéanamh den treoir seo.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: Úsáid mód beo nuair atá pointe cruinn an mhearbhaill ar eolas agat agus nuair atá an chéad mhíniú, ceist, leid, nó lúb athbhreithnithe eile uait.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: Úsáid mód atá tiúnáilte do leidí, ceisteanna, tráthanna ceist, spléachchártaí, aiseolas scríbhneoireachta, nó pleanáil.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: Úsáid tosaitheoir prasa

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: Úsáid ceacht struchtúrtha nuair atá réimse an chúrsa ar eolas agat agus nuair atá míniú seicheamhach nó tacar cleachtaidh uait.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: Úsáid tábla le taobh tosaigh, taobh cúil, leid, agus gaiste coitianta.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Úsáid IS mar chóitseálaí don thuiscint, don chleachtadh, agus don aiseolas in ionad aicearra a bhaintíonn an fhoghlaim go ciúin.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: Úsáid IS mar chóitseálaí ríomhchláraithe, mar pháirtí tionscadail, mar léirmhínitheoir sonraí, agus mar chúntóir taighde agus coinnigh an foghlaimeoir sa lúb.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: Úsáid IS mar shreabhadh oibre staidéir, ní mar aicearra.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: Úsáid aiseolas IS chun struchtúr agus soiléireacht a ghéarú gan do ghuth féin a chailleadh.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: Úsáid IS le haghaidh leidí, mínithe, seiceálacha botún, agus lúba athbhreithnithe. Ná hiarr air freagra deiridh a tháirgeadh nach féidir leat a mhíniú.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: Úsáid IS don chéad leid eile, do sheiceáil céime, nó d’aiseolas ar dhréacht agus coinnigh an réasúnaíocht dheiridh agus an guth deiridh agat féin.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Úsáid IS don smaointeoireacht timpeall an fhreagra

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: Úsáid domhan stairiúil IS, insamhlúcháin pearsan, díospóireacht, fealsúnacht, agus lipéid fianaise gan rólghlacadh a mheascadh le foinsí.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: Úsáid cóitseáil obair bhaile IS le haghaidh leideanna, seiceálacha céime, réasúnaíocht mhatamaiticiúil, agus aiseolas scríbhneoireachta agus an obair dheiridh fós agat féin.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: Úsáid insamhlúcháin IS mar scafalra foghlama agus coinnigh foinsí, fianaise, agus léirmhíniú soiléir.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: Úsáid taisteal ama IS, comhráite stairiúla, agus cleachtadh díospóireachta chun comhthéacs, fianaise, argóintí, agus peirspictíochtaí a fhiosrú.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: Úsáid IS chun brúthástáil a dhéanamh ar do réasúnaíocht, toimhdí a thabhairt chun solais, agus cinntí a fheabhsú.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: Úsáid IS chun réasúnaíocht a mhoilliú, céimeanna a sheiceáil, botúin a dhífhabhtú, agus coincheapa a chleachtadh.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Art Appreciation Guide nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Civics Coach. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Art Appreciation Guide nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: Úsáid ainmneacha suaitheantas, critéir, leibhéil, agus samplaí cruthúnais.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: Úsáid míreanna roimh/i ndiaidh, tosaíochtaí athbhreithnithe, agus réasúnaíocht ghonta.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: Úsáid Brainstorm Ideas chun roinnt bealaí a chruthú sula roghnaíonn tú ceann.

entries.source: Use calendars, checklists, and risk flags.
entries.value: Úsáid féilirí, seicliostaí, agus bratacha riosca.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Roleplay Scenario. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Career Explorer nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Roleplay Scenario. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Career Explorer nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use case
entries.value: Cás úsáide

entries.source: Use case file, choices, outcome, and learning note.
entries.value: Úsáid comhad cáis, roghanna, toradh, agus nóta foghlama.

entries.source: Use Case Study Simulator when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Feynman Tutor. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Case Study Simulator nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Feynman Tutor. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Case Study Simulator when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Case Study Simulator nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use cases
entries.value: Cásanna úsáide

entries.source: Use challenge cards, points, rounds, and debrief.
entries.value: Úsáid cártaí dúshláin, pointí, babhtaí, agus iarchur síos.

entries.source: Use citation entries plus a missing-fields checklist.
entries.value: Úsáid iontrálacha lua agus seicliosta réimsí ar iarraidh.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try History Cause-and-Effect. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Civics Coach nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as History Cause-and-Effect. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Civics Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Civics Coach nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: use client
entries.value: úsáid an cliant

entries.source: Use Code Tutor for concepts, Project Coach for product ideas, Data Interpreter for datasets, and Study Plan Builder for a learning roadmap.
entries.value: Úsáid Code Tutor do choincheapa, Project Coach do smaointe táirge, Data Interpreter do thacair sonraí, agus Study Plan Builder do mhapa bóthair foghlama.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or homework modes to isolate the exact point where reasoning breaks.
entries.value: Úsáid Code Tutor nó modhanna obair bhaile chun an pointe cruinn a aonrú ina mbriseann an réasúnaíocht.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: Úsáid Code Tutor nó Project Coach chun sprioc doiléir a iompú ina céim bheag intástáilte eile.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interview Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Code Tutor nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Interview Coach. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Code Tutor nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Socratic Instruction. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Collaborative Instruction nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Socratic Instruction. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Collaborative Instruction nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use commitment cards, check-in scripts, and recovery plans.
entries.value: Úsáid cártaí tiomantais, scripteanna seiceála isteach, agus pleananna téarnaimh.

entries.source: Use compact staged sections: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, then in-character exchanges with occasional claim labels and debrief on request.
entries.value: Úsáid rannáin stáitse dhlútha: suíomh, slis ama, eithne phearsana, balla comhad, sidecar staraí, ceisteanna oscailte molta, ansin malartuithe i gcarachtar le lipéid éilimh ó am go ham agus iarchur síos ar iarratas.

entries.source: Use compact UI-like sections: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, and Field Notes. End major turns with meaningful choices.
entries.value: Úsáid rannáin dhlútha cosúil le UI: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, agus Field Notes. Cuir roghanna bríocha ag deireadh sealanna móra.

entries.source: Use compact workroom sections such as Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, and Next action. Show suggested edits or diffs before merging when rewriting.
entries.value: Úsáid rannáin dhlútha seomra oibre amhail Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, agus Next action. Taispeáin eagarthóireachtaí molta nó diffs sula gcumascann tú agus tú ag athscríobh.

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: Úsáid leathanaigh chomparáide chun cuardach a threorú isteach i ngníomh.

entries.source: Use comparison tables and next-step experiments.
entries.value: Úsáid táblaí comparáide agus turgnaimh chéad chéime eile.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Spaced Review. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Concept Map Builder nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Spaced Review. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Concept Map Builder when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Concept Map Builder nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use concise claims, evidence prompts, and a final debate recap when asked.
entries.value: Úsáid éilimh ghonta, prasaí fianaise, agus achoimre dheiridh díospóireachta nuair a iarrtar í.

entries.source: Use concise code snippets, comments only when useful, and test cases.
entries.value: Úsáid míreanna gearra cód, nótaí tráchta amháin nuair atá siad úsáideach, agus cásanna tástála.

entries.source: Use concise drawing instructions, label lists, and visual checkpoints.
entries.value: Úsáid treoracha líníochta gonta, liostaí lipéad, agus seiceálacha amhairc.

entries.source: Use Cornell sections: cues, notes, summary, and recall checks.
entries.value: Úsáid rannáin Cornell: leideanna, nótaí, achoimre, agus seiceálacha cuimhne.

entries.source: Use course cards, resource lists, and weekly workload tables.
entries.value: Úsáid cártaí cúrsa, liostaí acmhainní, agus táblaí ualaigh oibre seachtainiúla.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Motivation Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Creative Brainstormer nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Motivation Coach. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Creative Brainstormer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Creative Brainstormer nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use dashboard cards, trend notes, weak spots, and next actions.
entries.value: Úsáid cártaí painéil, nótaí treochta, pointí laga, agus chéad ghníomhartha eile.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter to ask what the data says, what it does not say, and what to check next.
entries.value: Úsáid Data Interpreter chun fiafraí cad a deir na sonraí, cad nach ndeir siad, agus cad ba cheart a sheiceáil ina dhiaidh sin.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Source Critic. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Data Interpreter nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Source Critic. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Data Interpreter when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Data Interpreter nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use deadline tables, risk flags, and next actions.
entries.value: Úsáid táblaí spriocdháta, bratacha riosca, agus chéad ghníomhartha eile.

entries.source: Use debate and cause-effect modes to compare explanations and write a stronger argument.
entries.value: Úsáid modhanna díospóireachta agus cúis-éifeachta chun mínithe a chur i gcomparáid agus argóint níos láidre a scríobh.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to define the position, burden of proof, and opposing view.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate Any Topic chun an seasamh, ualach cruthúnais, agus an dearcadh freasúrach a shainiú.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to separate evidence, values, and assumptions.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate Any Topic chun fianaise, luachanna, agus toimhdí a scaradh.

entries.source: Use Debate Any Topic to test claims against counterarguments.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate Any Topic chun éilimh a thástáil i gcoinne frithargóintí.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Debate with a personality. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate any topic nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Debate with a personality. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Debate any topic when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate any topic nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use debate cards, concise rebuttals, and occasional scorekeeping of argument quality.
entries.value: Úsáid cártaí díospóireachta, frithfhreagraí gonta, agus scóráil ó am go ham ar cháilíocht argóintí.

entries.source: Use debate to compare the strongest claim and strongest counterclaim.
entries.value: Úsáid díospóireacht chun an t-éileamh is láidre agus an frithéileamh is láidre a chur i gcomparáid.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Talk to a historical person. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate with a personality nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Talk to a historical person. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Debate with a personality when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Debate with a personality nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: Use diagnosis, better model, why it works, and one check question.
entries.value: Úsáid diagnóis, samhail níos fearr, cén fáth a n-oibríonn sí, agus ceist seiceála amháin.

entries.source: Use diagrams in text, role explanations, and real-world scenarios.
entries.value: Úsáid léaráidí i dtéacs, mínithe róil, agus cásanna ón saol fíor.

entries.source: Use Economics Simulator when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Geography Explorer. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Úsáid Economics Simulator nuair is é seo an mód ceart don obair. Más mian leat cosán gaolmhar, bain triail as Geography Explorer. Is féidir leat blag foghlama IS a bhrabhsáil freisin le haghaidh modhanna staidéir, foghlaim Shócraiteach, spléachchártaí, rólghlacadh, agus cuimhne ghníomhach.

entries.source: Use Economics Simulator when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.

entries.source: Use equations, aligned steps, and short why-this-works notes.
entries.value: Úsáid cothromóidí, céimeanna ailínithe, agus nótaí gearra faoin gcúis a n-oibríonn sé seo.

entries.value: Úsáid fillteáin, clibeanna, achoimrí nótaí, naisc, agus gníomhartha athbhreithnithe.
